name: EXPLORE HOLE
description: Fly through a narrowing cave, dodge obstacles, collect power-ups, and survive as long as you can in this endless arcade challenge!
instructions: Keyboard W Up Move Up S Down Move Down A Left Slow Down D Right Speed Up J Use Grow K Use Harden L Use Speed Space Pause Restart ESC Quit B Toggle Music Mobile Left joystick to move right buttons for skills tap bott
